title: Memory Budget Manager
constraints: Total memory must stay under a configurable token budget
Eviction must be based on relevance or recency, not random
The budget check and eviction must happen automatically before each call
High-importance items should be protected from eviction
hints: Track an approximate token count for each memory item using a simple word-count heuristic (1 token ≈ 0.75 words)
Score each item by combining recency and access frequency, then evict the lowest-scoring items first
Allow marking certain items as 'pinned' so they are never evicted regardless of budget pressure

starterCode.langchain:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain_core.messages import HumanMessage, SystemMessage

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# BUG: Memory grows without bound — no budget enforcement
memory_items = []

def add_memory(item: str):
    memory_items.append(item)

def chat(user_input: str) -> str:
    add_memory(f"User: {user_input}")
    memory_block = "\n".join(memory_items)
    messages = [
        SystemMessage(content=f"You are a helpful assistant. Memory:\n{memory_block}"),
        HumanMessage(content=user_input),
    ]
    response = llm.invoke(messages)
    add_memory(f"Assistant: {response.content}")
    return response.content

# Simulate many interactions that fill up memory
for i in range(30):
    topic = f"Tell me an interesting fact about country number {i + 1} in the world."
    reply = chat(topic)
    print(f"Turn {i + 1} ({len(memory_items)} items): {reply[:60]}...")

print(f"\nTotal memory items: {len(memory_items)}")
total_chars = sum(len(item) for item in memory_items)
print(f"Total characters in memory: {total_chars}")
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew

# BUG: Memory grows without bound — no budget enforcement
memory_items = []

assistant = Agent(
    role="Assistant",
    goal="Answer questions about world countries",
    backstory="You are a helpful assistant with perfect memory.",
)

def add_memory(item: str):
    memory_items.append(item)

for i in range(30):
    topic = f"Tell me an interesting fact about country number {i + 1} in the world."
    add_memory(f"User: {topic}")
    task = Task(
        description=f"Memory:\n" + "\n".join(memory_items) + f"\n\nRespond to: {topic}",
        expected_output="An interesting fact about the country",
        agent=assistant,
    )
    crew = Crew(agents=[assistant], tasks=[task])
    result = crew.kickoff()
    add_memory(f"Assistant: {str(result)[:200]}")
    print(f"Turn {i + 1} ({len(memory_items)} items): {str(result)[:60]}...")

print(f"\nTotal memory items: {len(memory_items)}")
total_chars = sum(len(item) for item in memory_items)
print(f"Total characters in memory: {total_chars}")
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner

# BUG: Memory grows without bound — no budget enforcement
memory_items = []

agent = Agent(
    name="Assistant",
    instructions="You are a helpful assistant.",
)

def add_memory(item: str):
    memory_items.append(item)

for i in range(30):
    topic = f"Tell me an interesting fact about country number {i + 1} in the world."
    add_memory(f"User: {topic}")
    memory_block = "\n".join(memory_items)
    prompt = f"Memory:\n{memory_block}\n\nRespond to: {topic}"
    result = Runner.run_sync(agent, prompt)
    add_memory(f"Assistant: {result.final_output[:200]}")
    print(f"Turn {i + 1} ({len(memory_items)} items): {result.final_output[:60]}...")

print(f"\nTotal memory items: {len(memory_items)}")
total_chars = sum(len(item) for item in memory_items)
print(f"Total characters in memory: {total_chars}")

evaluationCriteria.label: Token budget enforced
evaluationCriteria.description: Total memory token count never exceeds the configured budget

evaluationCriteria.label: Eviction is relevance-based
evaluationCriteria.description: Least relevant or oldest items are evicted first, not random items

evaluationCriteria.label: Important items protected
evaluationCriteria.description: High-priority or pinned memory items survive eviction

evaluationCriteria.label: Budget enforced automatically
evaluationCriteria.description: The budget check and eviction happen before each LLM call without manual intervention
